initiatives.name: Unity & Struggle
initiatives.description: Revolutionary communist organization focused on building working class power and solidarity.

initiatives.name: Atlanta Community Fridge
initiatives.description: Network of community fridges providing free food access across Atlanta

initiatives.name: Food Not Bombs Atlanta
initiatives.description: Sharing free vegan and vegetarian meals with anyone who is hungry

initiatives.name: Trans Housing Coalition
initiatives.description: A trans-led organization fostering mutual aid and housing justice through direct support for transgender and gender non-conforming individuals experiencing housing insecurity in Atlanta. They coordinate emergency housing assistance, resource distribution, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing and creating pathways to stable housing for the trans community.

initiatives.name: Atlanta Housing Justice League
initiatives.description: Fighting evictions and displacement through direct action and mutual aid

initiatives.name: Sol Underground
initiatives.description: QTPOC-led ecosystem of abolitionists building community-led infrastructure and support

initiatives.name: Atlanta Survival Program
initiatives.description: Community-based mutual aid network providing direct support and resources

initiatives.name: Mutual Aid Atlanta
initiatives.description: Coordinating mutual aid efforts across the Atlanta metro area

initiatives.name: Southern Fried Queer Pride
initiatives.description: A queer and trans arts and advocacy organization building community through mutual aid, direct support, and cultural organizing in Atlanta. They coordinate resource sharing, arts programming, and solidarity networks while centering QTPOC voices and building power through creative resistance and community care.

initiatives.name: Solutions Not Punishment Collaborative (SNaP Co)
initiatives.description: A Black trans-led organization building safety, power, and resources through mutual aid, advocacy, and transformative justice. They coordinate direct support, community defense, and solidarity networks while building alternatives to policing and incarceration through grassroots organizing and Black trans leadership.

initiatives.name: Atlanta Justice Alliance
initiatives.description: A grassroots collective fostering mutual aid and community defense through direct action and solidarity organizing. They coordinate protest support, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through collective resistance, political education, and creating spaces for movement building and community care.

initiatives.name: Atlanta Solidarity Fund
initiatives.description: Provides assistance for arrestees who are unable to pay bail or other expenses through their own resources of those of their family and friends.

initiatives.name: Coming to the Table Atlanta
initiatives.description: A community organization working to acknowledge and heal from the racial wounds of the past and present through dialogue, mutual understanding, and relationship building. They facilitate conversations and actions that promote racial healing and equity through truth-telling, reconciliation, and restorative justice practices.

initiatives.name: SURJ Atlanta
initiatives.description: A chapter of the national SURJ network organizing white people to end white support for white supremacy through mutual aid and community solidarity. Following the leadership of Black, Indigenous, and People of Color-led organizations, they coordinate education initiatives, direct action support, and solidarity networks while building power through political education and accountable organizing.

initiatives.name: Community Movement Builders
initiatives.description: A member-based collective fostering mutual aid and community power through Black working-class organizing in Atlanta. They coordinate cooperative economics, tenant organizing, and solidarity networks while building power through political education, direct action, and creating spaces for community self-determination and collective liberation.

initiatives.name: Cooperate WNC
initiatives.description: A cooperative development organization fostering mutual aid and economic democracy through worker-owned businesses and solidarity economy initiatives. They coordinate cooperative education, business development support, and solidarity networks while building power through collective ownership, community wealth building, and creating spaces for economic justice.

initiatives.name: Food Not Bombs Atlanta
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective fostering food justice and community solidarity through free food sharing in Atlanta. They coordinate regular meal distributions, food recovery initiatives, and solidarity networks while building power through direct action, community care, and creating spaces for food sovereignty and collective nourishment.

initiatives.name: Atlanta Community Support Project (ACSP)
initiatives.description: Through community-based research and resource development, we provide those navigating discrimination and reentry the tools needed for self-advocacy and civic engagement.

initiatives.name: I Am Paragon
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community support in Atlanta. They coordinate direct assistance, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing and creating spaces for collective care and empowerment.

initiatives.name: Love Beyond Walls
initiatives.description: we're dedicated to changing the narrative around homelessness and poverty by meeting people right where they are.

initiatives.name: Atlanta Incarcerated Workers Organizing Committee - IWOC
initiatives.description: We are prison abolitionists who support folks incarcerated in resisting state terror within those razor wire plantations and concentration camps (disguised by reformist language as detention facilities or correctional institutions).

initiatives.name: Trans Social
initiatives.description: TransSOCIAL advocates for Trans visibility and unity within TLGBQ+ community. Currently serving the community in Florida and Georgia.

initiatives.name: Mariposas Rebeldes
initiatives.description: Trans+two spirit run. Indigenous cultures from all over the world collide building safe spaces, facilitating Altanta food & land autonomy for QTBIPOC

initiatives.name: Red Light District by TWO
initiatives.description: Atl, GA based org advocating #SexWork #DECRIM
